Uses of Package
com.sun.identity.console.base.model

  • Packages that use com.sun.identity.console.base.model 
    Package Description
    com.sun.identity.console.agentconfig  
    com.sun.identity.console.agentconfig.model  
    com.sun.identity.console.audit
    Contains the ViewBean classes and model package defining the Admin console UI used to create, delete, and edit instances of the audit service, defined in audit.xml.
    com.sun.identity.console.audit.model
    Contains the model, or data access functionality, consumed by the ViewBean context displaying audit instance state to be created, edited, or deleted.
    com.sun.identity.console.authentication  
    com.sun.identity.console.authentication.model  
    com.sun.identity.console.base  
    com.sun.identity.console.base.model  
    com.sun.identity.console.delegation  
    com.sun.identity.console.delegation.model  
    com.sun.identity.console.federation  
    com.sun.identity.console.federation.model  
    com.sun.identity.console.idm  
    com.sun.identity.console.idm.model  
    com.sun.identity.console.policy  
    com.sun.identity.console.policy.model  
    com.sun.identity.console.property  
    com.sun.identity.console.realm  
    com.sun.identity.console.realm.model  
    com.sun.identity.console.scripts  
    com.sun.identity.console.service  
    com.sun.identity.console.service.model  
    com.sun.identity.console.session  
    com.sun.identity.console.session.model  
    com.sun.identity.console.sts
    Contains the ViewBean classes and model package defining the Admin console UI used to create, delete, and edit instances of the rest sts service, defined in restSTS.xml.
    com.sun.identity.console.sts.model
    Contains the model, or data access functionality, consumed by the ViewBean context displaying rest-sts instance state to be created, edited, or deleted.
    com.sun.identity.console.task  
    com.sun.identity.console.task.model  
    com.sun.identity.console.user  
    com.sun.identity.console.user.model  
    com.sun.identity.console.webservices  
    com.sun.identity.console.webservices.model  
  • Classes in com.sun.identity.console.base.model used by com.sun.identity.console.agentconfig 
    Class Description
    AMConsoleException
    This exception is thrown to signal to the view bean that incorrect behavior is encountered in processing a request.
    AMModel
    This defines a set of methods that are exposed to view beans.
    AMPropertySheetModel  
  • Classes in com.sun.identity.console.base.model used by com.sun.identity.console.agentconfig.model 
    Class Description
    AMAdminConstants
    This interface contains a set of constants used by console classes.
    AMConsoleException
    This exception is thrown to signal to the view bean that incorrect behavior is encountered in processing a request.
    AMModel
    This defines a set of methods that are exposed to view beans.
    AMModelBase
    This class implements all the basic and commonly used methods used by view beans.

    Class Description
    AccessControlModel  
    AMAdminConstants
    This interface contains a set of constants used by console classes.
    AMAdminLog
    This class allows you to perform log.
    AMCommonNameGenerator
    AMCommonNameGenerator is a singleton class that generates common name for an user.

    This exception is thrown to signal to the view bean that incorrect behavior is encountered in processing a request.

    This defines a set of methods that are exposed to view beans.

    This class implements all the basic and commonly used methods used by view beans.
